entries.source: A good learning session has a loop
entries.value: Wani good learning zama has a madauki

entries.source: A practical look at how AI can make learning clearer, more personal, and more accessible without turning students into passive answer collectors.
entries.value: Wani mai amfani look at yadda AI can sa learning clearer, ƙarin sirri, da ƙarin accessible ba tare da turning dalibai zuwa marar aiki amsa collectors.

entries.source: A serious learning companion should help with the work around the answer:
entries.value: Wani serious abokin koyo ya kamata taimako tare da the work a kusa da the amsa:

entries.source: Access matters
entries.value: Samun dama yana da muhimmanci

entries.source: AI learning
entries.value: Koyon AI

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: Wani AI abokin koyo bai kamata ya pretend don be a magic ikon tushe. It bai kamata ya erase rashin tabbas, replace malamai, ko train masu koyo don kwafe amsoshi. mafi kyau systems suna gaskiya game da limits da bayyananne game da the difference between taimako da handoff.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
entries.value: Nemi a small farko mataki.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: Tambayi the AI don bincika naka tunani.

entries.source: checking whether the learner can explain the idea back.
entries.value: checking whether the mai koyo can bayyana the ra’ayi back.

entries.source: choosing the right starting level;
entries.value: zaɓar the daidai farawa mataki;

entries.source: End with a recap from memory.
entries.value: End tare da a recap daga ƙwaƙwalwa.

entries.source: For a learner, that can feel very different from searching the web. Search gives pages. A learning companion gives a path.
entries.value: Don a mai koyo, that can feel very different daga searching the web. bincike gives shafuka. Wani abokin koyo gives a path.

entries.source: For a wider view of how the public pages connect, browse the AI learning map, the subject hubs, or the AI learning prompt library. Those pages are designed to make the product understandable to learners and discoverable to search systems without hiding the useful parts behind an account wall.
entries.value: Don a wider duba na yadda the shafukan jama’a connect, bincika the koyon AI taswira, the cibiyoyin fanni, ko the koyon AI dakin karatun saƙonni. Those shafuka suna designed don sa the samfuri understandable don masu koyo da discoverable don bincike systems ba tare da hiding the mai amfani parts behind an asusu wall.

entries.source: giving examples before abstractions when needed;
entries.value: giving examples kafin abstractions lokacin da needed;

entries.source: Information is everywhere. Understanding is still unevenly distributed.
entries.value: Information shi ne everywhere. fahimta shi ne still unevenly distributed.

entries.source: noticing what the learner already understands;
entries.value: noticing abin da the mai koyo already understands;

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Na sirri tutoring shi ne powerful, amma Shi ne not equally available. Wani kyauta na jama’a koyon AI dandali zai iya taimakawa reduce that samun dama gap ta giving ƙarin people a patient farko place don koyi.

entries.source: Repair the weak spot.
entries.value: Gyara the wurin rauni.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
entries.value: Say the goal a cikin ordinary harshe.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything if you have a topic in mind. Try Socratic Instruction if you want questions instead of an explanation. Use Flashcard Builder when you need to remember, or Exam Prep Planner when the problem is organizing your study time.
entries.value: Fara tare da koyi Anything if kai have a batu a cikin mind. gwada Socratic Instruction if kai want tambayoyi maimakon an explanation. amfani da katin tunatarwa mai gina lokacin da kai buƙata don tuna, ko shirin jarabawa mai tsarawa lokacin da the problem shi ne organizing naka karatu lokaci.

entries.source: That does not replace teachers, communities, books, or schools. It gives learners another route in. It can help a student start homework, a parent explain a concept, a self-taught builder learn code, or a curious person follow a question that might otherwise disappear.
entries.value: Wannan ba ya replace malamai, communities, books, ko makarantu. It gives masu koyo another hanya a cikin. It zai iya taimakawa a dalibi fara aikin gida, a uba ko uwa bayyana a ra’ayi, a self-taught mai gina koyi lamba, ko a curious person follow a tambaya that might otherwise disappear.

entries.source: That gap is why an AI learning companion matters. A good companion does more than answer a question. It helps a learner choose a starting point, explains the idea in plain language, checks whether it made sense, and keeps going when the first explanation does not land.
entries.value: Wannan gap shi ne me ya sa an AI abokin koyo yana da muhimmanci. Wani good companion does fiye da amsa a tambaya. It helps a mai koyo zaɓi a farawa point, explains the ra’ayi a cikin plain harshe, bincike whether it made sense, da keeps going lokacin da the farko explanation ba ya land.

entries.source: That is especially important for homework. The useful question is not "Can AI produce the answer?" It usually can. The useful question is "Can AI help the learner understand the path to the answer?" That is why the guide on studying with AI without cheating yourself focuses on hints, checks, and transfer practice.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne especially important don aikin gida. mai amfani tambaya ba "Can AI produce the amsa?" It usually can. mai amfani tambaya shi ne "Can AI taimako the mai koyo fahimci the path don the amsa?" Wannan shi ne me ya sa the jagora a kan studying tare da AI ba tare da cheating yourself focuses a kan alamomi, bincike, da transfer atisaye.

entries.source: That is the standard inspir is aiming for: learning that feels accessible, personal, playful, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne the standard inspir shi ne aiming don: learning that feels accessible, sirri, playful, da mai amfani don anyone tare da sha’awar sani da an internet connection.

entries.source: That is why inspir separates learning jobs into public modes. If you want a gentle explanation, start with Learn Anything. If you want to reason through a concept instead of being lectured, use Socratic Instruction. If you are stuck on an assignment, Homework Coach is a better fit than a generic answer engine. The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne me ya sa inspir separates ayyukan koyo zuwa na jama’a modes. If kai want a gentle explanation, fara tare da koyi Anything. If kai want don reason ta hanyar a ra’ayi maimakon being lectured, amfani da Socratic Instruction. If kai suna stuck a kan an aiki, aikin gida koci shi ne a mafi kyau fit fiye da a generic amsa engine. format ya kamata serve the aikin koyo.

entries.source: That loop appears across the platform. Math Step Coach breaks a problem into steps. Flashcard Builder turns notes into recall practice. Quiz Me On Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. Writing Coach helps improve a draft without replacing the writer.
entries.value: Wannan madauki appears across the dandali. lissafi mataki koci breaks a problem zuwa matakai. katin tunatarwa mai gina turns bayanai zuwa tunawa atisaye. tambayoyi Me a kan Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. rubutu koci helps inganta a daftari ba tare da replacing the writer.

entries.source: The best AI learning sessions are not one long answer. They look more like a loop:
entries.value: Mafi kyau koyon AI sessions ba su one long amsa. su look ƙarin like a madauki:

entries.source: The best outcome is not a perfect answer. It is the moment a learner says, "I think I get it now. Let me try."
entries.value: Mafi kyau outcome ba a perfect amsa. Shi ne the moment a mai koyo says, "I think I get it now. Let me gwada."

entries.source: The common idea is simple: keep the learner active. AI should make thinking easier to start, not unnecessary to do.
entries.value: Na kowa ra’ayi shi ne mai sauƙi: keep the mai koyo mai aiki. AI ya kamata sa thinking easier don fara, not unnecessary don do.

entries.source: The easiest version of an AI tutor is a box that gives polished answers. That is useful sometimes, but it is not enough. A learner who only receives answers can leave with the page finished and the skill unchanged.
entries.value: Easiest version na an malamin AI shi ne a box that gives polished amsoshi. Wannan shi ne mai amfani sometimes, amma Shi ne not enough. Wani mai koyo who only receives amsoshi can leave tare da the shafi finished da the skill unchanged.

entries.source: The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Format ya kamata serve the aikin koyo.

entries.source: The goal is confidence
entries.value: Goal shi ne kwarin gwiwa

entries.source: The important move is to start with a real learning job, not a perfect prompt. A good companion can help shape the path once you begin.
entries.value: Important move shi ne don fara tare da a real aikin koyo, not a perfect saƙo. Wani good companion zai iya taimakawa siffa the path once kai begin.

entries.source: The job is not just answering
entries.value: Job shi ne ba kawai answering

entries.source: The most useful AI learning tools have a few habits in common:
entries.value: Most mai amfani koyon kayan aikin AI have a few dabi’u a cikin na kowa:

entries.source: They adapt the level without making the learner feel small.
entries.value: Su adapt the mataki ba tare da making the mai koyo feel small.

entries.source: They ask questions when the goal is unclear.
entries.value: Su tambaya tambayoyi lokacin da the goal shi ne unclear.

entries.source: They encourage practice, not just reading.
entries.value: Su encourage atisaye, ba kawai karatu.

entries.source: They give examples that match the learner's world.
entries.value: Su give examples that match the mai koyo's duniya.

entries.source: They make uncertainty visible when facts need checking.
entries.value: Su sa rashin tabbas visible lokacin da gaskiya buƙata checking.

entries.source: This is why inspir is built around learning modes. Sometimes you need a clear explanation. Sometimes you need Socratic questions. Sometimes you need a quiz, flashcards, debate practice, a writing coach, or a historical roleplay.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne me ya sa inspir shi ne an gina a kusa da yanayoyin koyo. Sometimes kai buƙata a bayyananne explanation. Sometimes kai buƙata Socratic tambayoyi. Sometimes kai buƙata a tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, muhawara atisaye, a rubutu koci, ko a na tarihi wasan kwaikwayo.

entries.source: This matters for schools and families because the first barrier is often not talent. It is the cost of help, the fear of asking a "basic" question, or the lack of a patient person at the exact moment confusion appears. A free public companion lowers the cost of beginning.
entries.value: Wannan yana da muhimmanci ga makarantu da iyalai because the farko barrier shi ne often not talent. Shi ne the cost na taimako, the fear na asking a "basic" tambaya, ko the lack na a patient person at the exact moment confusion appears. Wani kyauta na jama’a companion lowers the cost na beginning.

entries.source: Try the companion
entries.value: Gwada the companion

entries.source: Try the step yourself.
entries.value: Gwada the mataki yourself.

entries.source: turning passive reading into practice;
entries.value: turning marar aiki karatu zuwa atisaye;

entries.source: What an AI learning companion should do for everyone
entries.value: Abin da an AI abokin koyo ya kamata do ga kowa

entries.source: What it should not do
entries.value: Abin da it bai kamata ya do

entries.source: What the companion should provide
entries.value: Abin da the companion ya kamata provide
